442 TRNSPRTN_DCLN_RSPNS_DSCHRG_CD TRNSPRTN_DCLN_RSPNS_DSCHRG_CD Transportation: Patient declines to respond (Dsch) CHAR 1 This column documents that at the time of discharge the patient declined to respond to the question regarding lack of transportation. 0 = No
1 = Yes
